zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicolas Grandadam dit l'Homme於大約1624年出生在法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾普萊時，他的父親Adam Jean Colas Grandadam43歲，母親Marion Géhin11622歲。他於大約1645年10月與Mougeotte LE BETZ在法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾普萊結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1691年之前在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicolas Grandadam dit l'Homme于大约1624年出生在法国阿爾薩斯巴-爾普萊时，他的父亲Adam Jean Colas Grandadam43岁，母亲Marion Géhin11622岁。他于大约1645年10月与Mougeotte LE BETZ在法国阿爾薩斯巴-爾普萊结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1691年之前在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Nicolas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Nicholas
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nicolao
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

historicEvents.title: The Palace of Versailles
historicEvents.description: The Palace of Versailles was originally known as a hunting log and retreat for Louis XII. When Louis XIV took over he moved his family into it. After he died the palace was abandoned. It has since been turned into a museum.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicolas Grandadam dit l'Homme was born about 1624, in Plaine, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France, his father, Adam Jean Colas Grandadam, was 43 and his mother, Marion Géhin, was 11622. He married Mougeotte LE BETZ about October 1645, in Plaine, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died before 1691, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicolas Grandadam dit l'Homme est né environ 1624, à Plaine, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France, son père, Adam Jean Colas Grandadam, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Marion Géhin, avait 11622 ans. Il a épousé Mougeotte LE BETZ environ octobre 1645, à Plaine, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé avant 1691, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicolas Grandadam dit l'Homme um 1624 in Blen, Niederrhein, Elsaß, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adam Jean Colas Grandadam 43 und seine Mutter Marion Géhin 11622. Er hat um Oktober 1645 in Blen, Niederrhein, Elsaß, Frankreich Mougeotte LE BETZ geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb vor 1691 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicolas Grandadam dit l'Homme è nato il circa 1624 nel Plaine, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia, il suo padre, Adam Jean Colas Grandadam, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Marion Géhin, aveva 11622 anni. Lui sposato Mougeotte LE BETZ circa ottobre 1645, nel Plaine, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 1691, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicolas Grandadam dit l'Hommeが約1624年にフランスアルサスバス-ルヒンプレアインで生まれた時，父Adam Jean Colas Grandadamは43歳，母Marion Géhinは11622歳であった。約1645年10月にフランスアルサスバス-ルヒンプレアインでMougeotte LE BETZと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1691年以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicolas Grandadam dit l'Homme(이)가 대략 1624년 프랑스 알사스 바스-히 플레이인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam Jean Colas Grandadam(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Marion Géhin(은)는 11622세였다. 그는 대략 1645년 10월 프랑스 알사스 바스-히 플레이인에서 Mougeotte LE BETZ(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1691년 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicolas Grandadam dit l'Homme nasceu aproximadamente 1624, em Plaine, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, França, seu pai, Adam Jean Colas Grandadam, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Marion Géhin, tinha 11622 anos. Ele casou-se com Mougeotte LE BETZ aproximadamente outubro de 1645, em Plaine, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 1691, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicolas Grandadam dit l'Homme родился около 1624 г. в местности плеин, бас-рин, алсеис, Франция, его отцу по имени Adam Jean Colas Grandadam было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Marion Géhin, 11622. Он женился на женщине по имени Mougeotte LE BETZ около октябрь 1645 г. в местности плеин, бас-рин, алсеис, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер перед 1691 г. в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicolas Grandadam dit l'Homme nació aproximadamente 1624, en Plaine, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia, su papá, Adam Jean Colas Grandadam, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Marion Géhin, tenía 11622 años. Se casó con Mougeotte LE BETZ aproximadamente octubre de 1645, en Plaine, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió antes de 1691, en su pueblo.
